staticText: Deterministic browser-local markup and selling-price methodology available in English, French, Swahili and Hausa. From markup, selling price equals cost times one plus markup divided by 100. From target margin, selling price equals cost divided by one minus target margin divided by 100. Profit equals selling price minus cost; margin equals profit divided by selling price; markup equals profit divided by cost. Require cost greater than zero, markup greater than -100 percent and target margin less than 100 percent. Valid negative percentages model below-cost pricing. The optional unit is display-only. Never supply or infer tax, VAT, duty, exchange rates, market prices, industry targets, credit premiums or pricing recommendations. Inputs, uploaded CSV data and exports remain in the browser.
